operator_instances.transformation_goal: Add a second chromosome with different dimensions to test label positioning for multiple chromosomes.
operator_instances.rationale: Increases input complexity by requiring the solution to handle multiple chromosomes with varying start/end positions and title sizes.

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: The scaled case should prove that the label is correctly positioned above the chromosome for multiple chromosomes with different coordinates.
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: Label must appear above the chromosome (y > end_y_position) for each chromosome.
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: If the solution only works for a single chromosome with fixed coordinates, it will fail when applied to a second chromosome with different geometry.
semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: Create two chromosomes with different start/end positions and title sizes, draw labels for both, and verify SVG contains both labels at correct positions.

output_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include at least two chromosomes with distinct dimensions.

operator_instances.transformation_goal: Add constraint that label must be strictly above the chromosome's top edge (start_y_position + height) and centered horizontally.
operator_instances.rationale: Increases computational complexity by requiring precise coordinate calculations and handling edge cases like zero height or negative positions.

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: Scaled case must ensure label is positioned such that its bottom is above the top of the chromosome body (i.e., y_label + font_size < start_y_position if label anchored at bottom, but more practically y_label > start_y_position + 0.1*inch if anchored at middle).
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: Label must be drawn above the chromosome, not below.
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: If the solution draws label at original position (below), it will fail the constraint.
semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: Parse SVG to extract label coordinates and assert that label's y-coordinate is greater than the chromosome's top y-coordinate.

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: Test with chromosome having zero height (start_y_position equals end_y_position).
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: Label should still be drawn above the zero-height chromosome.
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: If solution assumes non-zero height, it may place label incorrectly.
semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: Create chromosome with start_y_position = end_y_position = 20, draw label, verify label is above 20.

output_requirements: Scaled executable cases must verify label position via SVG parsing.
Include at least one edge case.

operator_instances.transformation_goal: Remove hardcoded constant 0.1*inch and require dynamic calculation based on font size or chromosome height.
operator_instances.rationale: Increases robustness against changes in font size or chromosome dimensions. The solution must not assume a fixed offset.

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: Scaled case must prove that the solution does not use a constant offset (e.g., 0.1*inch) but instead calculates label y position based on font size or chromosome height.
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: Label offset must be dynamic: either proportional to title_size or based on chromosome height.
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: A solution with hardcoded offset of 0.1*inch will fail when title_size is large (e.g., 20) or chromosome height is small, causing overlap or misplacement.
semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: Set title_size = 20 and chrom.start_y_position = 5, check that label is still above and not overlapping.

output_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include at least one adversarial scenario with extreme parameter values.

operator_instances.transformation_goal: Add stronger verification by checking SVG output for correct text content, font name, and position relative to chromosome.
operator_instances.rationale: Increases verifier complexity by requiring executable checks on file artifacts, not just stdout.

new_checks.description: Parse SVG file and verify that a text element with specified label_name exists.
Verify the fontName of the label is 'Times-BoldItalic'.

file_output_tests.description: Check that SVG file is generated and has correct text.

semantic_test_specs.semantic_intent: Scaled case must prove that the output SVG contains the label with correct text and font.
semantic_test_specs.target_constraint: SVG must include a <text> element with the label name and correct font.
semantic_test_specs.expected_failure_mode: If label is missing or font is different, test fails.
semantic_test_specs.test_case_description: Execute the code, verify SVG file exists, parse it, and assert presence of text node with label and correct font.

output_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include file artifact checks on output SVG.
Verifier must parse SVG to extract text elements.
